_README: SCHEMA/EXAMPLE ONLY. This is NOT the live config and is not read at runtime. The live topology is admin-maintained once on the server Pi at <platform>/controller/config.json (the path CONTROLLER_CONFIG in testbed/testbed.env points to). To bootstrap a fresh testbed: copy this file there and edit the real IPs/users/keys. Run-level fields below (dataset, num_rounds, local_epochs, extra_args, ...) are OVERRIDDEN per run by your ExperimentSpec via testbed/launch.py; only the infrastructure fields (server/clients nodes, paths, ports, venv) are used as-is.
